enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs a morning in Boulder, recounting two mishaps: leaving cricket feeders outside overnight during a cold snap (killing $30 worth of crickets he needed for his geckos) and repeatedly losing hours of Google Earth tracing work to crashes. He shares his workflow for a detailed cartoon map of Boulder County, including all towns, roads, and county boundaries, and notes his leg pain from extended sitting.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Weed gives you a false sense of 'it'll be fine' that leads to dumb mistakes like leaving crickets out in the cold
Having a good memory is a silver lining — he'll remember not to repeat this mistake
Saving towns as individual smaller files instead of one large file prevents crashes and lost work
